name: Sophia Green
description: Specializes in the care of indoor plants, focusing on proper watering and light management. Through her guidance, hundreds of people have successfully kept their plants healthy and thriving.

name: James Leaf
description: Experienced in soil composition, fertilization, and nutrient management. He knows exactly how much nutrition each plant needs and how to provide it naturally.

name: Lina Bloom
description: Specialist in diagnosing plant diseases and providing natural remedies. Under her care, countless pest-infested plants have returned to full health.

name: Arif Rahman
description: Expert in rooftop gardening and creating green spaces in small areas. He teaches innovative methods for growing plants in urban environments.
